judge_scores.reasoning: The response correctly attributes the R$600 benefit to Bolsonaro but lacks specific details about the Auxílio Brasil and the PEC 1/2022.
The model incorrectly states the R$600 was implemented in 2020 during the pandemic as part of the emergency aid, when it was established in July 2022 by PEC 1/2022 as Auxílio Brasil.
